title: Tishbiy #8664
definition:
Tishbite = "captivity"

 n pr loc
 1) the home of Elijah
    1a) site unknown but maybe the town of Tishbe

 adj gent
 2) an inhabitant of Tishbe or Tishbi or Tesheb
    2a) site unknown and name uncertain
